name: readable
description: Beautiful replies as styled cards (Persian/RTL always, English by default) via a bundled MCP Apps card server: the model sends content only, the template carries all styling. KPI grids, charts, timelines, flows, callouts, badges, CTA buttons. Cards can also render straight from *-card.html files written by background workers (htmlFile mode, zero context cost). Plus report export and a visualize skill.
